{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accountant",
  "description": "Staffora Global Limited - Our client,&nbsp;Kiddies Zone Limited is a retail store focused on providing quality products for children and families.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location:&nbsp;Garki, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	As we prepare to open our new store in Garki, Abuja, we are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Accountant to manage the store&rsquo;s financial records.
	The Accountant will be responsible for maintaining accurate financial records, tracking sales and expenses, and preparing financial reports to support effective financial management of the store.


Key Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate financial and accounting records.
	Track and record daily sales and expenses.
	Prepare financial reports for management.
	Ensure proper bookkeeping and documentation of financial transactions.


Requirements


	OND / HND / Bsc in Accounting or a related field.
	Knowledge of bookkeeping and financial record keeping.
	Strong attention to detail and integrity.


Work Schedule:


	
	Monday &ndash; Saturday.
	


Compensation
?100,000 monthly salary.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;Kiddieszoneltd@gmail.com&nbsp;using&nbsp;&ldquo;Accountant &ndash; Abuja&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

Accountant Job at Staffora Global Limited




        
    

        
        Staffora Global Limited - Our client, Kiddies Zone Limited is a retail store focused on providing quality products for children and families.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Garki, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	As we prepare to open our new store in Garki, Abuja, we are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Accountant to manage the store’s financial records.
	The Accountant will be responsible for maintaining accurate financial records, tracking sales and expenses, and preparing financial reports to support effective financial management of the store.


Key Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate financial and accounting records.
	Track and record daily sales and expenses.
	Prepare financial reports for management.
	Ensure proper bookkeeping and documentation of financial transactions.


Requirements


	OND / HND / Bsc in Accounting or a related field.
	Knowledge of bookkeeping and financial record keeping.
	Strong attention to detail and integrity.


Work Schedule:


	
	Monday – Saturday.
	


Compensation
?100,000 monthly salary.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Accountant – Abuja” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "description": "Staffora Global Limited - Our client, Kiddies Zone Limited, is a retail store focused on providing quality products for children and families. As we prepare to open our new store in Garki, Abuja, we are looking for a dedicated and customer-friendly candidate to fill the position below:

Job Position: Receptionist

Job Location:&nbsp;Garki, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Schedule:&nbsp;Monday - Saturday

Job Summary


	We are seeking a friendly and organized Receptionist who will be responsible for welcoming customers, managing enquiries, and providing administrative support to ensure smooth daily store operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Welcome customers warmly and attend to them professionally.
	Manage phone calls, messages, and customer enquiries.
	Maintain a clean, organized, and presentable reception area.
	Provide administrative support to the store when required.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an SSCE with 1-2 years of experience.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Friendly, organized, and customer-oriented.
	Basic computer knowledge is an added advantage.


Compensation
N70,000 - N80,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;Kiddieszoneltd@gmail.com&nbsp;with &ldquo;Receptionist &ndash; Abuja&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

Receptionist Job at Staffora Global Limited




        
    

        
        Staffora Global Limited - Our client, Kiddies Zone Limited, is a retail store focused on providing quality products for children and families. As we prepare to open our new store in Garki, Abuja, we are looking for a dedicated and customer-friendly candidate to fill the position below:

Job Position: Receptionist

Job Location: Garki, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Schedule: Monday - Saturday

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a friendly and organized Receptionist who will be responsible for welcoming customers, managing enquiries, and providing administrative support to ensure smooth daily store operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Welcome customers warmly and attend to them professionally.
	Manage phone calls, messages, and customer enquiries.
	Maintain a clean, organized, and presentable reception area.
	Provide administrative support to the store when required.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an SSCE with 1-2 years of experience.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Friendly, organized, and customer-oriented.
	Basic computer knowledge is an added advantage.


Compensation
N70,000 - N80,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] with “Receptionist – Abuja” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Account Officer",
  "description": "Chez Resources Pharmaceuticals Limited is a pharmaceutical company specializing in the marketing of generic and proprietary branded pharmaceutical products. In prescription drugs category, Chez ranks among the top 20 pharmaceutical companies in Nigeria with a range of products numbering over 60 and nearly a decade and half experience in the pharmaceutical industry. The company enjoys a firmly established national and international presence, operating through a carefully tailored network of presence in Nigeria, with corporate headquarter in Onitsha, Anambra state.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Onitsha, Anambra
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	B.Sc. Degree / HND in Accounting, Business Administration, Banking &amp; Finance, Economics etc with 2 years post-NYSC experience in Accounting.
	Resides in Fegge, Odoakpu, woliwo, Awka Road.
	Not more than 35 years of age.


Salary
N150,000 - N250,000 / Month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to:&nbsp;competenthands2018@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-09",

  },

Account Officer Job at Chez Resources Pharmaceuticals Limited




        
    

        
        Chez Resources Pharmaceuticals Limited is a pharmaceutical company specializing in the marketing of generic and proprietary branded pharmaceutical products. In prescription drugs category, Chez ranks among the top 20 pharmaceutical companies in Nigeria with a range of products numbering over 60 and nearly a decade and half experience in the pharmaceutical industry. The company enjoys a firmly established national and international presence, operating through a carefully tailored network of presence in Nigeria, with corporate headquarter in Onitsha, Anambra state.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location: Onitsha, Anambra
Employment Type: Full-time
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Requirements


	B.Sc. Degree / HND in Accounting, Business Administration, Banking & Finance, Economics etc with 2 years post-NYSC experience in Accounting.
	Resides in Fegge, Odoakpu, woliwo, Awka Road.
	Not more than 35 years of age.


Salary
N150,000 - N250,000 / Month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front Desk Attendant",
  "description": "Recore Limited is wholly owned by Nigerians, and was established with a vision to deliver needed solutions to companies that are seeking to improve their efficiency and profitability by focusing on their core business. Our outsourcing services cover Personnel Supply, Dispatch and Fleet and Facility Management Services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Attendant

Job Location:&nbsp;Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Front Desk Attendant serves as the first point of contact for guests , providing exceptional customer service and ensuring a smooth check-in and check-out experience.
	The role involves managing reservations, handling guest inquiries, and maintaining a welcoming and professional front desk environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Greet and welcome guests warmly upon arrival.
	Manage guest check-in and check-out processes efficiently.
	Handle room reservations, cancellations, and modifications.
	Respond promptly to guest inquiries, requests, and complaints.
	Provide accurate information about hotel services, facilities, and local attractions.
	Maintain accurate guest records and ensure proper documentation.
	Process payments, issue receipts, and balance cash/transactions.
	Coordinate with housekeeping and maintenance to ensure room readiness.
	Monitor lobby activity and ensure a clean, organized front desk area.
	Handle phone calls, emails, and other communications professionally.
	Uphold hotel policies, procedures, and service standards.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Minimum of OND/HND/Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Hospitality, Business Administration, or related field.
	1&ndash;2 years of experience in a front desk or customer service role (hospitality preferred).
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Good organizational and multitasking abilities.
	Basic computer proficiency (MS Office and hotel management systems).
	Professional appearance and attitude.
	Ability to work flexible shifts, including weekends and holidays.


Key Skills:


	Customer Service Excellence
	Communication Skills
	Attention to Detail
	Problem-Solving
	Time Management
	Teamwork.


Salary
N70,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications / CV to:&nbsp;recoreltd@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Front Desk Attendant Job at Recore Limited




        
    

        
        Recore Limited is wholly owned by Nigerians, and was established with a vision to deliver needed solutions to companies that are seeking to improve their efficiency and profitability by focusing on their core business. Our outsourcing services cover Personnel Supply, Dispatch and Fleet and Facility Management Services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Attendant

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Front Desk Attendant serves as the first point of contact for guests , providing exceptional customer service and ensuring a smooth check-in and check-out experience.
	The role involves managing reservations, handling guest inquiries, and maintaining a welcoming and professional front desk environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Greet and welcome guests warmly upon arrival.
	Manage guest check-in and check-out processes efficiently.
	Handle room reservations, cancellations, and modifications.
	Respond promptly to guest inquiries, requests, and complaints.
	Provide accurate information about hotel services, facilities, and local attractions.
	Maintain accurate guest records and ensure proper documentation.
	Process payments, issue receipts, and balance cash/transactions.
	Coordinate with housekeeping and maintenance to ensure room readiness.
	Monitor lobby activity and ensure a clean, organized front desk area.
	Handle phone calls, emails, and other communications professionally.
	Uphold hotel policies, procedures, and service standards.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Minimum of OND/HND/Bachelor’s degree in Hospitality, Business Administration, or related field.
	1–2 years of experience in a front desk or customer service role (hospitality preferred).
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Good organizational and multitasking abilities.
	Basic computer proficiency (MS Office and hotel management systems).
	Professional appearance and attitude.
	Ability to work flexible shifts, including weekends and holidays.


Key Skills:


	Customer Service Excellence
	Communication Skills
	Attention to Detail
	Problem-Solving
	Time Management
	Teamwork.


Salary
N70,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications / CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

  "title": "Business Development Manager",
  "description": "Staffora Global Limited - Our client,&nbsp;Growthill Limited is an indigenous real estate development and general construction company with a clear objective of developing truly efficient and sustainable homes.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Kado, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Growthill Limited is seeking a results-driven Business Development Manager with a minimum of 4 years experience in the real estate sector to drive property sales, build strategic partnerships, and identify new business opportunities.
	The ideal candidate will play a key role in expanding the company&rsquo;s client base and increasing revenue.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities within the real estate market.
	Generate and manage leads, converting prospects into buyers or investors.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, partners, and stakeholders.
	Collaborate with marketing and sales teams to drive property sales.
	Conduct market research and provide insights on emerging opportunities.
	Meet and exceed sales and revenue targets.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor`s Degree
	Minimum of 4 years experience in business development or sales within the real estate industry.
	Proven track record of achieving sales or revenue targets.
	Strong negotiation, networking, and relationship management skills.
	Excellent communication and presentation abilities.
	Self-motivated, proactive, and target-driven.


Compensation &amp; Benefits


	N250,000 &ndash; N300,000 monthly salary
	5% commission on sales
	HMO
	Performance bonuses.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;Hr@growthillafrica.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Business Development Manager &ndash; Abuja&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",
